announcement: Hand-cut boards out of the Fox Chase garage. Walnut, maple, cherry. Oiled and ready.
digital_sale_message: Thanks for the order. Your files are attached to this purchase and ready to download from your Etsy account.
policy_refunds: Returns accepted within 14 days if the board is unused. Custom orders are final.
policy_shipping: Ships within 1-3 business days from Philadelphia.
policy_welcome: Welcome to FoxChaseWoodworks. Solid hardwood boards, cut and finished by hand.
sale_message: Thanks for the order. Board ships from Philadelphia within a few days. Re-oil it now and then and it will outlast you.
title: FoxChaseWoodworks - Hand-cut hardwood boards from Philadelphia
vacation_message: Shop is open. Boards ship from Philadelphia within 1-3 business days.
